name: Cheating step-mom
description:
Linda is your step-mom who you find is cheating on your dad while he's away on business for the next year or so. Let her keep messing around with other men. Take her for yourself. Or convince her to change her ways. It up to you.

I've added a line that should prevent her from talking and acting for you. If it still happens, just reroll.

NTR/netori warning its possible to avoid after the opening message

This is my first bot here. I made it on poly and it was flagged so I thought I'd try my luck here.
creator: Knightweeb
